auth.forgotPasswordEmailSent: Reset link sent to your email!
auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome to Apsara Talent! Select method to log in
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your Email or Mobile. We will help you reset your password.
auth.resetSubtitleWithToken: Create a strong password to keep your account safe.
auth.resetSubtitleWithoutToken: Paste the token from your email, then enter a new password.
auth.signupOptionTitle: Who do you wanna be in our platform?
auth.signupOptionSubtitle: Choose your role to get started with Apsara Talent.
auth.signupOptionNote: You can always update your profile later.
auth.signupSubtitle: Connect with professional community around the world.
auth.phoneLoginTitle: Sign in with Your Phone Number
auth.phoneLoginSubtitle: Enter your phone number and password to access your account.
auth.otpSubtitle: We will sent you an one time password code on your phone number.
auth.otpInstructions: Enter your one time password code here.
auth.emailVerificationSubtitle: Please verify you email by clicking the verify button below.

toast.unableToDownloadFile: Unable to download the file. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your activity overview at a glance.
dashboard.weeklyActivityDescription: Your activity over the last 7 days
dashboard.matchRateDescription: Percentage of likes that became matches
dashboard.noMatchesYet: No matches yet. Keep swiping to find your perfect {role}!

landing.heroDescription: Whether you're a freelancer seeking new opportunities or a professional advancing your career, our platform connects you with the right opportunities.
landing.sectionSubtitle: A platform forged with the same spirit of excellence that built one of the world's greatest wonders.
landing.angkorWatDescription: Like the timeless wonder of Angkor Wat, we build lasting connections between exceptional talent and great companies across Cambodia.
landing.featuresDescription: Our platform provides powerful tools for both job seekers and employers to find the perfect match.
landing.howItWorksDescription: Get started in three simple steps and find your perfect match.
landing.ctaDescription: Join thousands of professionals and companies already using Apsara Talent to build their future.
landing.step1Description: Sign up and build your professional profile with your skills, experience, and preferences.
landing.step2Description: Our AI-powered matching system connects you with the best opportunities or candidates.
landing.step3Description: Connect with your matches, schedule interviews, and begin your journey together.
landing.featureSmartMatchingDesc: AI-powered algorithms connect the right talent with the right opportunities based on skills and preferences.
landing.featureResumeBuilderDesc: Create professional resumes instantly with our AI-powered builder tailored for the Cambodian market.
landing.featureRealTimeChatDesc: Communicate directly with employers or candidates through our built-in messaging system.
landing.featureInterviewSchedulingDesc: Schedule and manage interviews seamlessly within the platform with calendar integration.
landing.featureCompanyProfilesDesc: Showcase your company culture, values, and open positions to attract top talent.
landing.featureBilingualDesc: Full support for both English and Khmer languages to serve all Cambodian professionals.

searchEmployee.bannerSubtitle1: Search top careers and connect instantly.
searchEmployee.bannerSubtitle2: Search careers, review company, and reach out directly — instantly.
searchEmployee.bannerMuted: Your great opportunity is just a click away.

searchEmployee.errorDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search terms and try again.
searchEmployee.emptyList: No jobs match your search criteria. Try adjusting your filters.

searchCompany.bannerSubtitle1: Search top talent and connect instantly.
searchCompany.bannerSubtitle2: Search profiles, review resumes, and reach out directly — instantly.
searchCompany.bannerMuted: Your next great hire is just a click away.
searchCompany.employeesFound: {count, plural, one {# Employee Found} other {# Employees Found}}
searchCompany.errorDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search terms and try again.
searchCompany.emptyList: No employees match your search criteria. Try adjusting your filters.

favorite.bannerTitle: Find your favorites at a Glance
favorite.bannerSubtitle1: Quick access to the companies and talents you've saved
favorite.bannerSubtitle2: Review, connect, and take the next step whenever you're ready
favorite.bannerMuted: Your personal shortlist — organized in one place.

matching.bannerTitle: Ready to find your match? Let's make it happen.
matching.bannerSubtitle1: Find Your Perfect Match & Start a Conversation
matching.bannerSubtitle2: Start chatting, connect instantly, and build your future together.
matching.bannerMuted: When companies and talents like each other — it's a match.

feed.employeeBannerTitle: Connect with global professionals and grow your network
feed.employeeBannerSubtitle1: Start your journey toward a career you love.
feed.employeeBannerSubtitle2: Build meaningful connections that open doors to new opportunities.
feed.employeeBannerMuted: Land your dream job with ease — no matter where you are.
feed.companyBannerSubtitle1: Build your dream team effortlessly, no matter where you are.
feed.companyBannerMuted: Post jobs, review profiles, and hire faster — all in one place

resumeBuilder.bannerSubtitle1: Build your beautiful resume with a smartest AI.
resumeBuilder.bannerSubtitle2: Join thousands of professionals who landed their dream jobs with our AI-powered resumes.
resumeBuilder.bannerMuted: Create professional resumes in minutes with AI-powered technology. Choose from premium templates and let our AI optimize your content for maximum impact.
